title: Hyperframes Project Config
description: Per-project configuration created by `hyperframes init`. Lives at the repo root as `hyperframes.json` and controls which registry `hyperframes add` pulls from and where each item type lands in the project tree.

$schema.description: URL of this JSON Schema. Enables IDE autocompletion and validation.

registry.description: Base URL of the registry to pull items from (e.g. the default Hyperframes registry or a private one).

paths.description: Target paths for each item type, relative to project root.

blocks.description: Where `hyperframes:block` items land, relative to project root.

components.description: Where `hyperframes:component` items land, relative to project root.

assets.description: Where asset files (images, fonts, videos) land, relative to project root.
